meta.description: Deterministic constraint rules for hinge-to-mounting-plate compatibility
meta.notes: These rules encode the mathematical relationships that the constraint reasoning engine must enforce. A valid configuration must satisfy ALL applicable rules.

rules.name: brand_lock
rules.description: Hinge and mounting plate must be from the same manufacturer

rules.name: series_compatibility
rules.description: Mounting plate series must be compatible with hinge series

rules.name: cabinet_type_match
rules.description: Hinge and mounting plate must target the same cabinet construction type

rules.name: overlay_in_range
rules.description: The desired overlay must fall within the plate's achievable range for the given application type. Note: hinges with application 'overlay' (e.g. Grass Tiomos cranking 03) map to the plate's 'full' overlay range, as cranking 03 achieves overlays within the full overlay range with a lower maximum.
rules.logic: desired_overlay_mm >= plate.overlay_range_mm[app_key][0] AND desired_overlay_mm <= plate.overlay_range_mm[app_key][1], where app_key maps full_overlay->full, half_overlay->half, inset->inset, overlay->full

rules.name: inset_support
rules.description: If application is inset, the mounting plate must support inset configurations

rules.name: door_thickness_range
rules.description: Door thickness must be within the hinge's supported range

rules.name: door_weight_limit
rules.description: Door weight must not exceed hinge capacity (per hinge, typically 2 hinges per door)

rules.name: hinges_per_door_by_height
rules.description: Number of hinges required depends on door height. Uses most conservative thresholds across Blum and Grass catalogs.

rules.name: boring_pattern_match
rules.description: The cabinet must have the correct boring pattern for the selected hinge

rules.name: wide_angle_weight_derating
rules.description: Hinges with opening angle > 120 degrees have reduced weight capacity
rules.reason: Wide-angle hinges place greater stress on the pivot mechanism

rules.name: face_frame_overlay_constraint
rules.description: Face frame cabinets have a minimum overlay determined by the frame width

rules.name: adjacent_door_clearance
rules.description: For adjacent doors sharing a partition, combined overlay of both doors must not exceed partition thickness
rules.logic: IF has_adjacent_door THEN left_overlay_mm + right_overlay_mm <= partition_thickness_mm

rules.name: corner_cabinet_angle_minimum
rules.description: Corner cabinet applications require minimum 155 degree opening angle

rules.name: mounting_method_match
rules.description: Hinge mounting method must be compatible with the plate mounting method. Screw-on hinges work with screw_on, euro_screw, and system_screw plates. Dowel hinges work with dowel and system_screw plates.
rules.logic: plate.mounting_method IN MOUNTING_COMPAT[hinge.mounting], where MOUNTING_COMPAT = {screw_on: [screw_on, euro_screw, system_screw], dowel: [dowel, system_screw]}

rules.name: cup_depth_door_thickness
rules.description: Door thickness must be at least cup_depth_mm + 2mm for proper hinge seating. This ensures sufficient material remains behind the hinge cup bore.
rules.logic: IF hinge.cup_depth_mm IS NOT NULL THEN door_thickness_mm >= hinge.cup_depth_mm + 2
